title: Haworthia × rigida
taxonomy: Haworthia × rigida is a hybrid succulent species that has been classified within the family Asparagaceae, specifically in the subfamily Asparagaceae subfam. Xanthorrhoeae. It belongs to the genus Haworthia and is further categorized within the section Haworthia section Limifolia. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic similarity with other species within the same genus. As such, Haworthia × rigida is often studied alongside other succulent species within the Xanthorrhoeae subfamily.

intro: Haworthia × rigida is a hybrid succulent plant species, known for its striking, upright, and rigid leaves. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections.
